intro.heading: Meet Your Photographer
intro.text: With a passion for capturing emotion and elegance, I specialize in fashion, weddings, and editorial storytelling. Every shoot is a collaboration — let’s create something timeless.

albums.heading: Explore Our Signature Albums
albums.text: Each collection captures a unique story, mood, and moment. Browse through to discover the artistry behind every frame.

albums.heading: Explore Our Signature Albums
albums.text: Each collection below captures a unique story, mood, and moment. Browse through to discover the artistry behind every frame.

aboutMe.heading: About Me
aboutMe.text-1: Hello, I’m Jan Hajek — a photographer driven by a deep passion for capturing the beauty, emotion, and individuality of people through fashion and portraiture.
aboutMe.text-2: From the moment I first held a camera, I knew photography would be more than a craft — it would be my way of telling stories. Every face, every glance, every moment holds something unique, and my mission is to reveal that essence through the lens.
aboutMe.text-3: I specialize in portrait and fashion photography, blending creativity with authenticity to craft visuals that resonate. For me, a photo isn’t just a snapshot — it’s a living expression of how I see the world.
aboutMe.text-4: If you’re looking for photographs that not only capture your presence but celebrate your uniqueness, you’re in the right place. Let’s create something unforgettable together.

contact.heading: Let’s Connect
contact.text: Whether you’re looking to collaborate, book a shoot, or just say hello — I’d love to hear from you.

footer.heading: Ready to capture your best moments?
footer.text: Whether it's portraits, events, or creative shoots — I'm here to make it unforgettable.
